frontmatter.title: Rawa Buntu Station 2.0
frontmatter.title_sub: Revolutionizing Urban Mobility through ‘Order in Circulation’
frontmatter.abstract: This project introduces a redesigned station to improve how people move around the existing station. The main idea in this design is called ‘Order in Circulation.’ The key focus is on organizing the movement of passengers, couriers, cars, motorbikes, and apartment residents. By solving the main issues at Rawa Buaya Station, the overall urban environment is expected to become more efficient and organized.
frontmatter.pr_contribution: Research, Conceptual Design, Design Development & Visualization
frontmatter.pr_contributor: Arnott Ferels, Oliver Kenny & Harry Marvin
frontmatter.pr_jury: Tiyok Prasetyoadi, Abimantra Pradhana Nina Carina
frontmatter.pr_type: Collaborative work in the National Student Competition by Tarumanagara University (Architectural Design Week: Park 'n Joy)

mdx.body:
# Issues & Strategies ![Issues & Strategies](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-issues-strat.jpg "Issues & Strategies") Issues & Strategies. ![Aerial view – The bridge & viewing deck](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-pers-aerial.jpg "Aerial view – The bridge & viewing deck") Aerial view – The bridge & viewing deck. # Concept & Programming – Order in Circulation ![Concept](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-concept.jpg "Concept") Concept. This initiative aims to create a distinctive public parking facility by emphasizing comfort, openness, and inclusivity, including features for people with disabilities. The goal is to encourage a shift in community behavior towards utilizing public transportation, reducing the impact of traffic congestion.
![Level 1](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-level-01.jpg "Level 1") Level 1. ![Level 2](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-level-02.jpg "Level 2") Level 2. ![Level 3](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-level-03.jpg "Level 3") Level 3. ![Level 4](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-level-04-rooftop.jpg "Level 4") Level 4.
![Section](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-section.jpg "Section") Section. # Design
![The Bridge & viewing deck](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-pers-01.jpg "The Bridge & viewing deck") The Bridge & viewing deck. ![Ramp from/to the train platform](./figures/rawa-buntu-station-2-0-pers-02.jpg "Ramp from/to the train platform") Ramp from/to the train platform.
